topic: The struggle of choosing a podcast for my morning commute
text_en: Ugh, every single morning, it's the same thing. I get on the train, pull out my phone, and then I'm just staring at my podcast app. There are so many options! Do I go for that true crime series I started? Or maybe something educational to, you know, broaden my horizons? Sometimes I just want a comedy to lighten the mood before work. It takes me like five minutes just to pick one, and by then, I've almost missed my stop. I really need to get organized and have a few ready to go. It's a silly problem, but it really sets the tone for my day!
